landing.headline: Hola, I'm Lola.
landing.sub: Moving to Spain is a hundred small steps — visas, padrón, taxes, healthcare — and they only work in the right order. I've helped others make this move, and I'll walk it with you the whole way.
landing.subQuiet: Answer a few questions and I'll build your personal roadmap: real steps, real deadlines, nothing you don't need.
landing.greeting: Hola, I'm Lola. I'll build your roadmap right here as we talk — real steps, real deadlines, nothing you don't need.

done: That's everything I need — your roadmap is ready.

fallback.question: Could you tell me about {{hint}}?
fallback.clarifyReask: Could you tell me a little more about {{hint}}?
fallback.clarifyPrefix: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. {{reask}}
fallback.turnFailed: Sorry — that took longer than it should have. Your answer is still in the box; mind sending it again?

static.speaks_spanish: You can get by in English at first, but real life in Spain runs on Spanish — so it helps to know your starting point. Where's your Spanish right now?
static.nationalities: Your passports set the route — visas, registrations, even citizenship timelines hang on them. Where's everyone in the household a citizen?
static.work_situation: How you'll earn points at which residence route fits. What'll your work situation be when you move?
static.employer_country_is_foreign: For remote employees, this points the visa route. Is your employer based outside Spain?
static.annual_income_eur_band: Some visa routes carry income requirements, so I'll check your plan against them — a range is all I need. Which band fits?
static.has_spouse_or_partner: Family shape changes the paperwork — and some of the requirements. Is a partner making this move with you?
static.partner_is_married: Spain treats registered relationships differently for family paperwork. Is yours legally registered? A marriage or civil partnership both count.
static.has_children: Kids bring school enrollment into the plan. Any children coming with you?
static.intends_long_stay: How much of the year you'll spend here changes your tax picture and which registrations apply. Will you be in Spain more than six months a year?
static.arrival_date: Very exciting — moving to Spain! Let's start where you probably already are: roughly when are you hoping to arrive? Even just a month is fine — it anchors every deadline on your roadmap.
static.has_spanish_address: An address unlocks the town-hall registration — the padrón — that much of the rest hangs on. Do you already have a place lined up in Spain?
static.owns_or_drives: Driving here can mean exchanging your licence — or a Spanish exam — depending on your country. Will anyone in the household be driving?
static.owns_property_in_spain: Property brings its own cluster of steps — notary, registry, taxes. Do you own — or plan to buy — property in Spain?
static.region: Some steps vary by comunidad, so this makes your roadmap more precise. Which part of Spain will you settle in?
static.has_pets: Pets travel on their own rules and timelines. Any pets making this move with you?
static.foreign_assets_eur_band: Residents declare foreign assets above certain levels — this just decides whether those steps apply to you. You only pick a range: roughly how much do you hold outside Spain?
static.previously_ex_spanish_colony_nationality: Nationals of former Spanish colonies are on a much shorter citizenship clock. Do you hold nationality from one — most of Latin America, or the Philippines?
static.property_purchase: The purchase date anchors the notary, registry and tax deadlines. Roughly when did (or will) it complete? A month is enough.
static.wants_citizenship: This decides whether we plan the full citizenship track, or just keep your residence renewals tidy. Longer term, are you hoping to become a Spanish citizen?

roadmap.title: Your roadmap
roadmap.empty: Your steps will appear here as you answer.
